# Sift for Subscription Fraud

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Subscription fraud happens when a bad actor signs up for a subscription-based service using false or stolen identity and payment information, with no intention of paying for the service or goods received.

Download our subscription fraud primer to learn more about:

*   How subscription fraud undercuts revenue and damages customer loyalty—with worsening impact over time
*   Why streaming platforms turn to Sift’s AI-powered decisioning models to protect the entire user journey, from signup to purchase and play

### Explore Sift for Subscription Fraud

Download

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
